text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 109 

MDCR_SNF_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare — Skilled Nursing Facility Months (from Claims) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of months during the year where the beneficiary was in a skilled nursing 
facility (SNF), according to Medicare claims. A hierarchical algorithm is used, so that SNF is only 
counted for the month if there is not a Medicare long-term care hospital claim. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE:
